requirement_topic.en: E-Control / APG Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Austrian Network
requirement_topic.zh: E-Control / APG并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz奥地利电网
requirement_topic.zht: E-Control / APG併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz奧地利電網

summary.en: Austrian electricity supply is regulated by E-Control, with Austrian Power Grid (APG) operating the transmission network and regional DSOs operating the distribution network. The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring APG / Austrian DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation. OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules apply alongside EU directives for electrical installations in Austria. German-language project and commissioning documentation is commonly required.
summary.zh: 奥地利电力供应由E-Control监管，奥地利电力网格（APG）运营输电网，地区DSO运营配电网。低压电网环境为230 V单相/400 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成APG/奥地利DSO供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。OVE（奥地利电工协会）电工技术规则与欧盟指令并行适用于奥地利电气安装。通常须提供德语项目和调试文件。
summary.zht: 奧地利電力供應由E-Control監管，奧地利電力網格（APG）運營輸電網，地區DSO運營配電網。低壓電網環境為230 V單相/400 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成APG/奧地利DSO供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能品質審查、調試及書面項目驗收。OVE（奧地利電工協會）電工技術規則與歐盟指令並行適用於奧地利電氣安裝。通常須提供德語項目和調試文件。

standards_or_laws: APG (Austrian Power Grid) network connection requirements
OVE (Österreichischer Verband für Elektrotechnik) electrotechnical rules for electrical installations in Austria
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
Austria low-voltage grid context — 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Austria's 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline. Chinese installation documentation is not accepted as evidence of compliance with Austrian E-Control, APG, or OVE requirements.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相/380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：奥地利230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。中国安装文件不被接受为符合奥地利E-Control、APG或OVE要求的证据。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相/380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：奧地利230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。中國安裝文件不被接受為符合奧地利E-Control、APG或OVE要求的證據。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices (RCD Type B or A+DC per OVE/Austrian rules), metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for APG / Austrian DSO review. For alpine or remote-grid sites, load management and demand limits should be agreed with the relevant Austrian DSO before shipment. German-language documentation is expected.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相/400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护装置（按OVE/奥地利规则采用B型RCD或A型+直流检测）、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按APG/奥地利DSO审查准备。对于高山或偏远电网场址，应在出货前与相关奥地利DSO确认负载管理和需量限制。须提供德语文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相/400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護裝置（按OVE/奧地利規則採用B型RCD或A型+直流檢測）、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按APG/奧地利DSO審查準備。對於高山或偏遠電網場址，應在出貨前與相關奧地利DSO確認負載管理和需量限制。須提供德語文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require E-Control, APG, and Austrian DSO project review and acceptance; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency; OVE rules apply; German-language documentation expected
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an Austrian E-Control / APG approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Austria's 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Austria-ready EVSE needs E-Control / APG / Austrian DSO project acceptance, explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation, and OVE-compliant electrical installation documentation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. German-language documentation is commonly required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向奥地利的EVSE需要E-Control/APG/奥地利DSO项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz，以及符合OVE规则的电气安装文件。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。通常须提供德语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向奧地利的EVSE需要E-Control/APG/奧地利DSO項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz，以及符合OVE規則的電氣安裝文件。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。通常須提供德語文件。
